---
title: "Subject Index"
author: "A. J. Smit"
date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY/MM/DD"
---

# Subject Index (A–Z)

This index is designed as a back-of-book retrieval tool for the BCB744 biostatistics chapters.

Entries are alphabetical. In place of page numbers, links point to chapter locations.

## A

- **AIC (Akaike Information Criterion)**: [17](17-model-checking-and-evaluation.qmd), [25](25-regularisation.qmd)
- **ANOVA**: [8](08-anova.qmd)
  - assumptions for ANOVA: [6](06-assumptions-and-transformations.qmd)
  - post-hoc contrasts: [8](08-anova.qmd)
- **assumptions**: [6](06-assumptions-and-transformations.qmd), [11](11-residuals-and-model-based-diagnostics.qmd)

## B

- **Bayesian inference**: *see* **inference, statistical**
- **bias**: [16](16-collinearity-confounding-measurement-error.qmd)
  - measurement bias: [16](16-collinearity-confounding-measurement-error.qmd)
  - omitted-variable bias: [16](16-collinearity-confounding-measurement-error.qmd)
- **boxplots**: [3](03-visualise.qmd)

## C

- **causal interpretation**: [14](14-multiple-regression-and-model-specification.qmd), [24](24-prediction-and-explanation.qmd)
- **CLT (Central Limit Theorem)**: [4](04-distributions-sampling-uncertainty.qmd)
- **collinearity**: [16](16-collinearity-confounding-measurement-error.qmd)
- **confidence intervals**: [5](05-inference.qmd), [12](12-simple-linear-regression.qmd), [24](24-prediction-and-explanation.qmd)
- **confounding**: [16](16-collinearity-confounding-measurement-error.qmd)
- **correlation**: [9](09-correlation-and-association.qmd)
  - correlation vs causation: [9](09-correlation-and-association.qmd), [24](24-prediction-and-explanation.qmd)
- **cross-validation**: [17](17-model-checking-and-evaluation.qmd), [25](25-regularisation.qmd)

## D

- **data visualisation**: [3](03-visualise.qmd)
- **dependence (non-independence)**: [19](19-dependence-and-mixed-models.qmd)
- **descriptive statistics**: [2](02-summarise-and-describe.qmd)
- **diagnostics**: [11](11-residuals-and-model-based-diagnostics.qmd), [17](17-model-checking-and-evaluation.qmd)
- **distributions**: [4](04-distributions-sampling-uncertainty.qmd)

## E

- **effect size**: [5](05-inference.qmd), [12](12-simple-linear-regression.qmd)
- **elastic net**: [25](25-regularisation.qmd)
- **explanation vs prediction**: [24](24-prediction-and-explanation.qmd)

## F

- **false discovery / Type I error**: [5](05-inference.qmd), [8](08-anova.qmd)

## G

- **GAM (Generalised Additive Model)**: [21](21-generalised-additive-models.qmd)
- **GLM (Generalised Linear Model)**: [20](20-generalised-linear-models.qmd)

## H

- **heteroscedasticity**: [6](06-assumptions-and-transformations.qmd), [11](11-residuals-and-model-based-diagnostics.qmd)
- **hypothesis testing**: [5](05-inference.qmd)

## I

- **independence assumption**: [6](06-assumptions-and-transformations.qmd), [18](18-pseudoreplication.qmd), [19](19-dependence-and-mixed-models.qmd)
- **interaction effects**: [15](15-interaction-effects.qmd)

## L

- **lasso**: [25](25-regularisation.qmd)
- **likelihood**: [5](05-inference.qmd), [20](20-generalised-linear-models.qmd)
- **linear regression**: [12](12-simple-linear-regression.qmd), [14](14-multiple-regression-and-model-specification.qmd)
- **link function**: [20](20-generalised-linear-models.qmd)

## M

- **measurement error**: [16](16-collinearity-confounding-measurement-error.qmd)
- **mixed-effects models**: [19](19-dependence-and-mixed-models.qmd)
- **model checking**: [11](11-residuals-and-model-based-diagnostics.qmd), [17](17-model-checking-and-evaluation.qmd)
- **model selection**: [10](10-test-selection.qmd), [17](17-model-checking-and-evaluation.qmd), [25](25-regularisation.qmd)
- **multiple comparisons**: [8](08-anova.qmd)
- **multiple regression**: [14](14-multiple-regression-and-model-specification.qmd)

## N

- **nonlinear regression**: [22](22-nonlinear-regression.qmd)
- **normality**: [4](04-distributions-sampling-uncertainty.qmd), [6](06-assumptions-and-transformations.qmd)

## O

- **overfitting**: [17](17-model-checking-and-evaluation.qmd), [25](25-regularisation.qmd)

## P

- **p-value**: [5](05-inference.qmd)
- **partial residuals**: [14](14-multiple-regression-and-model-specification.qmd)
- **polynomial regression**: [13](13-polynomial-regression.qmd)
- **prediction intervals**: [12](12-simple-linear-regression.qmd), [24](24-prediction-and-explanation.qmd)
- **pseudoreplication**: [18](18-pseudoreplication.qmd)

## Q

- **QQ plot**: [11](11-residuals-and-model-based-diagnostics.qmd)
- **quantile regression**: [23](23-quantile-regression.qmd)

## R

- **regularisation**: [25](25-regularisation.qmd)
  - ridge regression: [25](25-regularisation.qmd)
  - lasso: [25](25-regularisation.qmd)
  - elastic net: [25](25-regularisation.qmd)
- **reproducibility**: [26](26-reproducible-workflow.qmd)
- **residual diagnostics**: [11](11-residuals-and-model-based-diagnostics.qmd)
- **robustness checks**: [17](17-model-checking-and-evaluation.qmd)

## S

- **sampling uncertainty**: [4](04-distributions-sampling-uncertainty.qmd)
- **self-assessment tasks**: [Biostatistics Self-Assessment](../tasks/BCB744_Biostats_Self-Assessment.qmd)
- **statistical inference**: [5](05-inference.qmd)
- **study design**: [18](18-pseudoreplication.qmd)

## T

- **test selection**: [10](10-test-selection.qmd)
- ***t*-tests**: [7](07-t_tests.qmd)
- **transformations**: [6](06-assumptions-and-transformations.qmd)
- **Type I and Type II error**: [5](05-inference.qmd)

## V

- **variance partitioning**: [8](08-anova.qmd)
- **visualisation**: [3](03-visualise.qmd)

## W

- **workflow, reproducible**: [26](26-reproducible-workflow.qmd)

## Cross-references

- **AIC**: *see also* **model selection; overfitting**
- **correlation**: *see also* **causal interpretation; prediction vs explanation**
- **independence**: *see also* **dependence; pseudoreplication; mixed-effects models**
- **normality**: *see also* **assumptions; transformations**
- **regularisation**: *see also* **overfitting; cross-validation; model selection**
